channel.title: Comments on: Maui Brewing Company Big Swell IPA, Ep. 109
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
hey fellas,
figured out the comment feature...gotta click on the episode as opposed to watching on the home page. got it!
really enjoying the show, just wish there were more of them more often! keep up the good work!
Thanks,
Paul
item.content:encoded:
hey fellas,

figured out the comment feature…gotta click on the episode as opposed to watching on the home page. got it!

really enjoying the show, just wish there were more of them more often! keep up the good work!

Thanks,

Paul

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
Finally a beer I had the pleasure to taste this summer at Le Mondial de la Bierre here in Montreal. I really enjoyed it and will look for it again next year (hopefully they will attend the competition again).
Cheers, Marco
item.content:encoded:
Finally a beer I had the pleasure to taste this summer at Le Mondial de la Bierre here in Montreal.
I really enjoyed it and will look for it again next year (hopefully they will attend the competition again).

Cheers,
Marco
